body.title: D-approach-frame-principle-2026-04-21
body.text:
# D-approach-frame-principle-2026-04-21

**Date:** 2026-04-21  
**Status:** open  
**Spawned:** T-palace-approach-frame-rule, T-palace-rules-versioned, T-audit-cc-rules-approach-frame, T-audit-igor-cp-approach-frame, T-igor-self-audit-approach-frame, T-approach-frame-sensor-node, T-slow-metrics-sensor-tree-pattern, T-sweep-avoidance-frame-docs

Canonicalize 'approach-frame' (Elliot approach goals / Janoff-Bulman prescriptive norms) as the first-class rule-shaping principle across the whole system. Rules say what TO DO, not what to avoid. Infrastructure spans: top-level palace rule, versioned rule evolvability, CC palace audit, Igor CP1-6 audit, Igor self-audit habit for rule-shaped memories, SensorTree metric node (% complete, text sparkline), slow-metrics migration pattern, generated-doc sweep. Triggered by 7th correction on the FIX-ALL audit policy — avoidance-framed rules kept failing; positive focus is the stable frame. Akien 2026-04-21: "maybe you need a thing to focus on instead of a thing to NOT FOCUS ON."

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-04-29T20:46:02.298251+00:00
**Ticket count:** 8 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-palace-approach-frame-rule (S) — Add approach-frame as top-level palace rule (above persona)  `done` — Palace node theigors/rules/approach-frame written. States the positive-target principle, cites Elliot+Janoff-Bulman, carries revision: 2026-04-21 line. Auto-echoed to lab/theigors/. Commit 59e76863.
- T-palace-rules-versioned (M) — Add revision/updated affordance to palace rules (versioned memory)  `done` — Every theigors/rules/* palace node carries 'revision: 2026-04-21 — initial versioned tag' line. Pattern established: future rule edits append new revision lines. 16 nodes updated (rules + ticket_desig
- T-approach-frame-sensor-node (M) — SensorTree node for approach-frame audit metric (versioned history, text sparkline)  `done` — Palace subtree theigors/metrics/approach_frame_audit/ created (7 nodes). Helpers in wild_igor/igor/tools/palace_metric.py: read_counter, increment_metric, append_history, parse_history, render_sparkli
- T-audit-igor-cp-approach-frame (S) — Score Igor CP1-6 against approach-frame; propose CP6 reframe for Akien review  `done` — CP1-6 scored. 5 already approach-framed. CP6 mixed-shape flagged, 5 reframe options proposed (A-E); Igor's direct call: keep original — hard edge is load-bearing axiom, not pessimism. Rationale saved 
- T-audit-cc-rules-approach-frame (M) — Audit CC palace rules through approach-frame lens; dissolve do-not rule  `done` — 10 top-level CC palace rules audited: 2 already approach-framed (persona, docs-live-in-code), 7 content-reframed (budget, coding, collaboration, commits, database, igor-constraints, memory), 1 dissolv
- T-sweep-avoidance-frame-docs (M) — Sweep generated docs + feedback files for avoidance-frame language; reframe  `done` — 5-category sweep. Pass-1/Pass-2 area docs clean. audit_checks.json: 3 descriptions reframed. SKILL.md Hard rules: 11 files (sprint, sprint-batch, review, decided, fixit, context-load, commit, day-clos
- T-slow-metrics-sensor-tree-pattern (M) — Establish slow-metrics-to-SensorTree pattern; migrate 2-3 examples  `done` — Rule theigors/rules/metrics established: slow progress metrics live in palace subtrees under theigors/metrics/. Frequency heuristic documented. Two example subtrees created: pass2_findings (Pass-2 epi
- T-igor-self-audit-approach-frame (L) — Igor self-audit habit: scan rule-shaped memories for avoidance-frame, propose reframes  `done` — ApproachFrameAuditSource shipped: night-time periodic scan of rule-shaped memories, regex-scored, writes pending_approach_reframe FACTUAL candidates with TWM markers. 24 tests pass. Commit 75d2cb24.

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: unknown.
